title: Merry Christmas
wikitext:
[]: Merry Christmas             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Dec 25, 2004 2:55 am Merry Christmas. Anyone get any Eva junk for X-Mas? I sure as hell did. Evangelion NewType Film Book 1-9 Evangelion NewType Death Film Book Evangelion NewType Air Film Book The Continuity of Evangelion 1-4 Evangelion T-Shirt Featuring Eva Units 00, 01, and 02

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sat Dec 25, 2004 3:27 am Merry Christmas! The Eva Monkey wrote: Anyone get any Eva junk for X-Mas? I sure as hell did.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Dec 25, 2004 5:23 am Uhhh... I'm getting a new computer, or something. Hey, Aaron, out of curiosity, how much did it cost to get that stuff sent to you from jpqueen?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sat Dec 25, 2004 8:31 am Merry Christmas

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sat Dec 25, 2004 11:46 am M e r r y C h r i s t m a s 8) With some of the gift cards I received I am getting NGE manga, Volume 9 and Der Mond. Then on the 28th I will use some of my Best Buy cards and get volume 4 of the platinum series.

[]:             Quote Post by Tabris » Sat Dec 25, 2004 12:15 pm Aye, Merry Christmas an' all that jazz. I didn't get anything Eva-related, thanks to a habit of impulse-buying that leaves me wondering if there's anything else I could want. I suppose manga vol. 9 counts as a present for myself... (although I ordered the thing weeks and weeks ago). I'll be hitting the eBay auctions shortly though. Lack of buying inspiration never lasts too long.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Dec 25, 2004 12:36 pm Yahoo! Japan has more Eva crap that the mind can comprehend... You know, I always wonder every year -- how many Christians know that they're celebrating a Pagan holiday today? Ah, ignorance is a very mighty force indeed. (That and commercialism.) At least the Jehovah's Witnesses did their homework (even if they refuse to participate in birthday parties as a result).

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sat Dec 25, 2004 12:55 pm Reichu wrote: You know, I always wonder every year -- how many Christians know that they're celebrating a Pagan holiday today?

[]:             Quote Post by max3000 » Sat Dec 25, 2004 1:17 pm Marry Kurisemasuu! I got some RAM for my pc lol

[]: Re: Merry Christmas             Quote Post by Gilgamesh » Sat Dec 25, 2004 2:00 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Merry Christmas. Anyone get any Eva junk for X-Mas? I sure as hell did.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Dec 25, 2004 3:23 pm Reichu wrote: You know, I always wonder every year -- how many Christians know that they're celebrating a Pagan holiday today?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Dec 25, 2004 4:42 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Gotta love the supression of pagan peoples by taking over their holiday and changing what it means.

[]: Finally saw "Kimi Ga Nozomu Eien"             Quote Post by Phaze » Sat Dec 25, 2004 5:56 pm Let's see, I got Texhnolyze volume 1, and . . . Texhnolyze volume 1 and . . . :( Perhaps I should be more assertive in what I want for Christmas? Gilgamesh wrote: Alien Nine

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Dec 25, 2004 6:21 pm Reichu wrote: I was going to order from jpqueen after you showed me the site, but shipping, like, doubled the price of everything, so I figured I would hold off.

[]:             Quote Post by chocomanji » Sat Dec 25, 2004 9:30 pm Happy Holidays Everyone!!! I got NOTHING Eva related...but it doesn't matter, b/c technically EM's stuff is my stuff!!!!! BWAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA....suckers!!!! :twisted:

[]:             Quote Post by MAGI » Sat Dec 25, 2004 10:16 pm It's way past Christmas, here, now.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sat Dec 25, 2004 11:29 pm I didn't get jack-shit for Hex-mas. I demand you all share your stuff with me, on account of me being myself!

[]:             Quote Post by anatrok » Sun Dec 26, 2004 1:02 am I got Platinum Vol. 3, I'll watch it tonight. I finally got enough monay to complete my Eva Manga collection to vol. 9, and prolly start getting Rahxephon. Yeah, I got a lot of cool stuff for christmas. And happy...whatever you celebrate to all-y'all.
